## Checklist
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated
- [ ] Release notes updated
- [ ] VERSION file updated
- [ ] Migrations reviewed
- [ ] Env vars reviewed
- [ ] Smoke test passed
- [ ] Tag created
- [ ] Notes published
